correctness.exact_48_step_decisions: 48/48 exact for clean argmax, sampled ids, entropy, accept mask, renoised canvas, and the explicit clean commit candidate in both RUN-first argmax and production chunked-Gumbel modes; see selfcond_prechunk_decisions.json and selfcond_prechunk_gumbel_decisions.json
correctness.qualitative: three prompt-correct control/default prompts bit-identical in both traced RUN-first argmax and eager production chunked-Gumbel modes; complete anomaly accounting is in selfcond_prechunk_qualitative.json and selfcond_prechunk_gumbel_qualitative.json
correctness.watcher: clean traced 4-step smoke; non-aligned prompt length 24; four attach and four detach records; see selfcond_prechunk_watcher_summary.json

limitations: dynamic logits slices and the 32 online-softmax matmuls remain
ENABLE_TRACY=OFF; component attribution uses synchronized timings
model-load allocation count increases by 31 while weight payload bytes stay constant
full-depth traced 256K is blocked by the combined trace-region and 128 MiB token-entropy temporary live set; eager production chunked-Gumbel 256K capability passes at the full 48-step budget

the July-10 optimization ranking remains a RUN-first argmax comparison; as of 2026-07-13 traced_denoise.py also supports materialized and production chunked-Gumbel in single-step traces, with separate K=48/max_seq_len=1024 evidence in doc/vllm_integration/traced_chunked_gumbel_20260713.json
